mapper.select:
SELECT tnm.note_id AS noteId , tnm.metric_code AS metricCode , tnm.score , cc.code_name AS metricName
FROM tasting_note_metric tnm
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON tnm.metric_code = cc.code AND cc.group_code = 'TASTE_METRIC'
WHERE tnm.note_id = #{noteId}
ORDER BY cc.sort_seq

SELECT tnm.metric_code AS metricCode , cc.code_name AS metricName , ROUND(AVG(tnm.score), 1) AS avgScore
FROM tasting_note_metric tnm
JOIN tasting_note tn ON tn.note_id = tnm.note_id AND tn.drink_id = #{drinkId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.code = tnm.metric_code AND cc.group_code = 'TASTE_METRIC'
GROUP BY tnm.metric_code
ORDER BY cc.sort_seq
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tasting_note_metric WHERE note_id IN ( SELECT note_id FROM tasting_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} )
